mapper.select: SELECT type FROM food WHERE no=(SELECT fno FROM (SELECT fno,count(*) as review_cnt FROM foodReview WHERE id=#{id} GROUP BY fno ORDER BY review_cnt DESC) WHERE rownum=1)
SELECT addr1 FROM member WHERE id=#{id}
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM food WHERE type LIKE '%'||#{type}||'%' and address LIKE '%'||#{address}||'%' ORDER BY score DESC) WHERE rownum<=5
